segments.text: Nice confirmed KO! Good stuff, just barely surviving that
segments.original_text: いい確定撃墜いいじゃないギリギリ耐える
そうですねベクトル変更

segments.text: He managed to survive using SDI effectively
segments.original_text: ずらし活用して生存することには成功した

segments.text: Even Homura can send them offstage, but...
segments.original_text: 場外に出すことがホムラサイドでもできますが

full_text: Nice confirmed KO! Good stuff, just barely surviving that Yeah, with that DI He managed to survive using SDI effectively Alright, tight stage here Too good though Somehow Even Homura can send them offstage, but...
